extension.valueString: The valueSet http://hl7.org/fhir/test/ValueSet/vs-gender-big includes codes not allowed in the claimed profile which has value set http://hl7.org/fhir/test/ValueSet/vs-gender-small (codes: other, unknown)

details.text: This profile does not comply with claimed profile 'http://hl7.org/fhir/test/StructureDefinition/complies-with-binding-superset-base' because: The valueSet http://hl7.org/fhir/test/ValueSet/vs-gender-big includes codes not allowed in the claimed profile which has value set http://hl7.org/fhir/test/ValueSet/vs-gender-small (codes: other, unknown)
